fields.title: Implement isolated autoresearch VCS checkout, keep integration policy, and blocked resolution state
fields.description:
Implement task-scoped VCS isolation for autoresearch trials instead of mutating the user’s primary workspace checkout.

Each autoresearch task must run in a controller-owned isolated checkout with task branch and phase base commit recorded in persisted state. keep must commit on the isolated branch. discard/crash/checks_failed cleanup must only affect the isolated checkout. Unsafe or ambiguous VCS cleanup must transition into the explicit blocked/manual-resolution state with operator-facing recovery metadata.

For kept changes, implement the ADR rule that accepted changes remain on the task’s isolated branch and checkout until a separate explicit integration step. keep must not implicitly sync code back into the user’s main workspace checkout.
